servinfo.title: Front Drive Shaft Disassembly and Reassembly

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Drive Shaft Assembly Removal and Installation:Front

item.ptxt: Disassembly of wheel side joint is not allowed. If any noise or damage exists in wheel side joint, replace the joint as assembly.
Do not disassemble tripod joint. If any malcondition is found in tripod joint, replace tripod joint assembly.

s1.ptxt: Remove boot big band (1) of differential side as follows.
To disengage hook, pinch band as shown in figure and remove band.
Remove differential side joint housing from tripod joint.
Wipe off grease from shaft and take off snap ring (1) using snap ring pliers (2).
Remove tripod joint (1) using 3-arm puller (2).

attention2.ptxt: To prevent any problem caused by washing solution, do not wash tripod joint except its housing. Degreasing of tripod joint with shop cloth is allowed.

s1.ptxt: Use flat-bladed screwdriver (1) or the like to release caulking (2) of differential side boot small band (3).
Pull out differential side boot from shaft.
For right side drive shaft, use flat-bladed screwdriver (2) or the like to release caulking of damper band (1) and remove damper from shaft.
Use flat-bladed screwdriver (1) or the like to undo caulking (2) of wheel side boot small band (3) and big band (4), and then pull out wheel side boot from shaft.

servinfosub.title: Reassembly

attention2.ptxt: Do not squeeze or distort boot when fastening boot with boot bands. Squeezing boot to force air out may distort boot and reduce its durability.

servinfosub.ptxt: Judging from abnormality noted before disassembly and what is found through visual check of component parts after disassembly, prepare replacing parts and proceed to reassembly.
Make sure that wheel side joint assembly (1) and housing of tripod joint (2) are washed thoroughly and air dried.

item.ptxt: To prevent any problem caused by washing solution, do not wash tripod joint except its housing. It is acceptable to use a shop cloth to degrease tripod joint.
Degreasing of tripod joint with shop cloth is allowed.
Do not wash boots in degreaser such as gasoline or kerosene, etc. Washing in degreaser causes boot deterioration.
To ensure full performance of joint as originally designed, apply the specified amount of grease to respective joint according to the following procedure.

s1.ptxt: Wash disassembled parts (except boots). After washing parts, air dry them completely.
Clean boots with shop cloth.
Apply grease “NSG851” from the service kit to wheel side joint.
Install wheel side boot on shaft.
Fill boot inside with specified grease.
Fit boot to grooves of shaft and wheel side joint housing (1).
Insert flat-bladed screwdriver into boot (2) and allow air to enter boot so that air pressure in boot becomes the same as the atmospheric pressure.
Place new boot big band (3) and small band (4) onto wheel side boot so that outer end (1) of each band faces in forward rotation (2) as shown in figure.
Fasten boot big band (2) and boot small band (1) using special tool as shown in figure.
For right side drive shaft, install damper (1) to specified position on drive shaft.
Fasten new damper band (1) using special tool as shown in figure.
Wash disassembled parts (except boots). After washing parts, air dry them completely.
Clean boots with shop cloth.
Install differential side boot on shaft.
Install tripod joint (1) on shaft using special tool with hammer, directing its chamfered spline (3) toward wheel side, and then fasten tripod joint with new snap ring (2) using snap ring pliers (4).
Apply grease “NKG814” from the service kit to tripod joint, differential side joint housing (1) and boot.
Fit boot (1) to grooves of shaft and differential side joint housing (2) at the specified position below.
Insert flat-bladed screwdriver or the like into boot (1) and allow air to enter boot so that air pressure in boot becomes the same as atmospheric pressure.

spec.title: Drive shaft boot fixing position (distance between differential side joint end and boot small band center)

s1.ptxt: Place new boot big band and small band onto differential side boot so that band end (1) bends against forward rotation [a] as shown in figure.
Fasten boot big band and boot small band as shown in figure.
